questions.q: What did colonists mean by 'No Taxation Without Representation'?
options: They should not be taxed by a Parliament in which they had no elected representatives
Only the king could tax them
Taxes should be paid in tea
questions.explanation: The principle was consent: a free people should be taxed only with their agreement.

questions.q: Why did Britain begin taxing the colonies after 1763?
options: To pay debts from the French and Indian War
Because the colonies asked for taxes
To build the Statue of Liberty
questions.explanation: Britain won the war but was left with large debts.

questions.q: The 1773 Boston Tea Party was a protest against what?
questions.explanation: Colonists dumped British tea into Boston Harbor to protest the Tea Act.

questions.q: Where did fighting begin in April 1775, starting the Revolutionary War?
questions.explanation: The clash at Lexington and Concord was the 'shot heard round the world.'

questions.q: On what date was the Declaration of Independence adopted?
questions.explanation: The Continental Congress adopted it on July 4, 1776.
